content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — login-gated app (`App/LoginView.swift:9` SecureField) ships placeholder demo credentials and notes: `demo_user.txt` = `test`, `demo_password.txt` = `changeme`, `notes.txt` = `TBD`.
Pierre: Apple's reviewers must be able to log in and exercise the core features, so placeholder credentials and empty notes routinely trigger a Guideline 2.1 rejection or a metadata-rejected loop. All three review_information files are unusable placeholders here. Replace them with a real working demo account and step-by-step notes explaining how to reach the app's key screens before submitting.
